concerns.text: FR-003 (LZC & PE calculation) and SC-001 (N≥30 participants) lack completed implementation tasks. T014 and T015 are marked as FAILED/missing implementation logic for iterating participants and writing CSVs, leaving the core feature extraction requirement unfulfilled.
FR-006 (Sensitivity Analysis table) is unfulfilled. T021 is marked as uncompleted/rejected, and no task exists to generate the required `data/analysis/sensitivity_table.csv` artifact.
SC-002 (Runtime ≤ 6h) and SC-003 (Memory ≤ 7GB) lack verification tasks. T036 (runtime) and T026 (memory) are uncompleted, meaning no task produces evidence to confirm these success criteria are met.

Tasks T037, T038, and T039 implement topological attractor analysis (RQA, complexity states) based on a reviewer comment, but the spec.md contains no corresponding FR or SC for these metrics. These are stale/unapproved scope items that should be removed or linked to a new spec requirement.
T022 (Final Report) is marked as rejected/missing artifact. Without a completed task producing `docs/final_report.md`, the reporting requirements of FR-004 and FR-006 cannot be verified as delivered.
